name: ecogrid
description: EcoGrid — Autonomous Smart Grid Management System

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.db:init: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f database/schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f database/triggers_procedures.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f database/cron_jobs.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f database/seed.sql
